case_title: PATRICK PAK HIM YU VS. CHEE TIM LUI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED JUN-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, CHEE TIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PATRICK PAK HIM YU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANTS CHEE TIM LUI AND LAI SHEUNG TO ARE PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, PATRICK PAK HIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, CHEE TIM $904.86 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $954.86, SECURITY DEPOSIT $600 PLUS INTEREST FROM 12/1/1998 TO 1/31/2022 IS $304.86. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0522815D005, TAG # 037010 BY DEFENDANT LUI, CHEE TIM
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT LUI, CHEE TIM
(SC-145)JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS TO PROCESS -REQUEST FORWARDED TO ACCT DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, PATRICK PAK HIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,833.00 FILED BY YU, PATRICK PAK HIM AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, CHEE TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
